title: SerializationIsBad
description: A Minecraft coremod aiming to patch serious security vulnerabilities found in many different mods
body:
A few weeks ago, a very critical vulnerability allowing arbitrary remote code execution on clients and servers (and therefor even all connected clients on a server) was discovered in many Minecraft mods.

 

More details on the whole topic as well as a list of all currently known affected mods is available [here](https://github.com/dogboy21/serializationisbad/blob/master/README.md)
